//: Team-wide settings, committed to git. Personal overrides go in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored). See .claude/settings.local.json.example for the shape.

hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qEi 'git\s+push\s+(-f\b|--force\b)|npm\s+publish\b|docker\s+push\b|terraform\s+destroy\b|kubectl\s+delete\s+(namespace|ns)\b|rm\s+-rf\s+(/|~|\$HOME)(\s|$)'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Blocked: destructive or sensitive operation. Ask the user for explicit approval before proceeding."}'; else echo '{"decision": "allow"}'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -oE '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]+"' | head -1 | sed -E 's/.*"([^"]+)"$/\1/'); BASE=$(basename "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$BASE" | grep -qE '^\.env$|^\.env\.[^.]+$|\.env$|\.pem$|\.key$|\.cert$|\.p12$|\.pfx$'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Blocked: writing to a credential or secret file ('"$FILE"'). If this is not a secret (e.g. .env.example), ask the user to confirm."}'; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '/\.ssh/|/\.aws/|/\.gnupg/'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Blocked: writing inside a credentials directory ('"$FILE"')."}'; else echo '{"decision": "allow"}'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -oE '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]+"' | head -1 | sed -E 's/.*"([^"]+)"$/\1/'); if [ -z "$FILE" ] || [ ! -f "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.md|*.css|*.html) command -v prettier >/dev/null 2>&1 && prettier --write --log-level=silent "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.py) command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || { command -v black >/dev/null 2>&1 && black -q "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; } || true ;; *.go) command -v gofmt >/dev/null 2>&1 && gofmt -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.rs) command -v rustfmt >/dev/null 2>&1 && rustfmt --quiet "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; exit 0

D=".claude/checkpoints"; mkdir -p "$D" 2>/dev/null; TS=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S); { echo '# Pre-compact checkpoint'; echo "Created: $(date -u +%FT%TZ)"; echo; echo '## Branch'; git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null; echo; echo '## Uncommitted changes'; git status --short 2>/dev/null; echo; echo '## Recent commits'; git log --oneline -10 2>/dev/null; } > "$D/checkpoint-$TS.md" 2>/dev/null; echo '{"decision": "allow"}'
